_comment: PLACEHOLDER thresholds for StackCube-v1. Replace with calibrated values from `python -m teemo.calibrate_thresholds` once you have success demos. The placeholder values come from the StackCube workspace scale (cube_half_size=0.02, ~10cm reach) and the rule layout in teemo/calibrate_thresholds.py. All length units are meters; angles enter alignment via lambda_rot=0.05.
